title: Ahmad b. Yusuf's letter of congratulation to 'Abdallah on his restoration of order in Egypt
description: Ahmad b. Yusuf's letter of congratulation to 'Abdallah on his restoration of order in Egypt. Recorded under the year 211 AH (826–827 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
